summary: Regression smoke test for UserDashboard <Link> import fix (iteration_4 critical bug). Logged in as customer1@test.com, navigated to /dashboard — page renders cleanly: no 'Something went wrong', no 'Link is not defined', 'Recent Orders' section rendered with 5 clickable order entries. data-testid='dash-order-fc8aa73e-...' present with href '/orders/fc8aa73e-...'. Clicking the link navigated to /orders/{id} and OrderDetail rendered all 5 required testids: order-status-badge='Pending Payment', order-address='TEST 123 Test Street, KL', order-staff-name='Sam', order-resend-whatsapp-btn href starts with 'https://wa.me/60126884925?text=', order-total='RM110.00'. Critical bug from iteration_4 is RESOLVED.
critical_code_review_comments: UserDashboard.js line 2 now correctly imports Link from react-router-dom — fix verified.

Pre-existing iteration_4 minor note still stands: backend serializes naive ISO datetimes (no Z/offset); MyFlashSales countdown will be off in non-UTC browsers. Not blocking, not part of this regression scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UserDashboard Link import fix verified end-to-end (dashboard renders -> order links clickable -> OrderDetail testids all present). No further regression needed for this fix. iteration_4 backend (29 PASS + 1 xfail) was not re-run as instructed.
rca_of_the_issue: Fixed by main agent: `import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';` added at /app/frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.js line 2. Verified component now mounts and renders dash-order-{id} Link components correctly.
